description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 30 hrs 45 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 48 mins. WakaTime shows work across 6 projects, with most time in Other, Java, and Markdown. There were no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories listed.
